scripts.sync:todo-assets: mkdir -p public/zk/todo && rm -rf public/zk/todo/keys public/zk/todo/zkir && cp -r contracts/managed/todo/keys public/zk/todo/ && cp -r contracts/managed/todo/zkir public/zk/todo/
scripts.sync:shielded-todo-assets: mkdir -p public/zk/shieldedTodo && rm -rf public/zk/shieldedTodo/keys public/zk/shieldedTodo/zkir && cp -r contracts/managed/shieldedTodo/keys public/zk/shieldedTodo/ && cp -r contracts/managed/shieldedTodo/zkir public/zk/shieldedTodo/
scripts.sync:mint-assets: mkdir -p public/zk/shieldedMint/keys public/zk/shieldedMint/zkir && cp contracts/managed/shieldedMint/keys/mintShielded.* public/zk/shieldedMint/keys/ && cp contracts/managed/shieldedMint/zkir/mintShielded.* public/zk/shieldedMint/zkir/
scripts.prepare:todo: npm run compact:todo && npm run compact:shielded-todo && npm run sync:todo-assets && npm run sync:shielded-todo-assets
scripts.prepare:mint: npm run compact:mint && npm run sync:mint-assets
scripts.prepare:contracts: npm run prepare:todo && npm run prepare:mint
scripts.predev: npm run sync:todo-assets && npm run sync:shielded-todo-assets && npm run sync:mint-assets
scripts.prebuild: npm run sync:todo-assets && npm run sync:shielded-todo-assets && npm run sync:mint-assets
